name: WP-L12-sr-announcements: announce streamed replies, quiz results, loading, toasts
description: Wire live-region / screen-reader announcements across the core flow. Findings: F-050 (streamed tutor messages never announced — THE core flow) · F-051 (quiz answer result correct/wrong+revealed not announced) · F-053 (busy states not announced — 31 of 50 ActivityIndicator files, systemic) · F-054 (confirmation toast invisible to screen readers) · F-068 (coordinator synthesis: SR users get silence in the most-used flow). Full finding text: docs/audit/2026-05-29-full-audit/L-gap-delta.md (label l10n-a11y-mobile).
acceptanceCriteria: One announcement pattern chosen (accessibilityLiveRegion / announceForAccessibility) and applied consistently; streamed replies, quiz results, toasts and loading states announced; pattern noted in code for reuse.
riskImpact: M / touches core session UI — behavior-additive only.
bodyText:
Bundle brief (WP-L12-sr-announcements)
Transcribed from the PRG-12 execution tracker §1 (_wip/l10n-a11y/execution-tracker.md @ 9570f5b63) — bundle #2 of 8. Children are absorbed provenance (lifecycle rides this parent): WI-635 / WI-636.
Bundle rationale
Screen-reader users currently get silence in the app's most-used flow (streamed tutor replies) and across results/loading/toast surfaces. One announcement pattern, applied consistently, fixes the whole class (P1).
Strategy
Choose ONE announcement mechanism (accessibilityLiveRegion vs AccessibilityInfo.announceForAccessibility) and apply it consistently across the four surfaces; document the chosen pattern in code for reuse by later bundles (WP-3 modal/roles work touches adjacent components). Streamed replies need a debounced/at-completion announcement strategy — announce coherent units, not every token. All new announcement strings route through t() (same-PR en.json keys), consistent with WP-1 hygiene.
Scope
In: F-050, F-051, F-053, F-054, F-068 (coordinator synthesis — resolved by the four concrete fixes). Out: modal focus management, roles, input labels, badges (WI-623 / WP-L12-modal-focus-roles); decorative-content hiding (WI-628).
Findings
F-050 — Streamed tutor messages are never announced to screen-reader users — THE core flow (a11y-C1).
F-051 — Quiz answer result (correct/wrong + revealed answer) is not announced (a11y-H1).
F-053 — Loading/busy states not announced — systemic, 31 of 50 ActivityIndicator files (a11y-H3).
F-054 — Confirmation toast is invisible to screen readers (a11y-H4).
F-068 — Coordinator synthesis: SR users get silence in the most-used flow (summary-A11Y-C1).
Full finding text: docs/audit/2026-05-29-full-audit/L-gap-delta.md (label l10n-a11y-mobile).
Acceptance Criteria (bundle)
One announcement pattern chosen and applied consistently; the pattern is noted in code for reuse.
Streamed tutor replies, quiz results, confirmation toasts, and loading/busy states are announced to screen readers.
Announcement copy routed through t() with en.json keys in the same PR; i18n checkers green.
Risk & blast radius
Low-medium — a11y props/announcement calls on existing components; out-of-radius vs the identity rewrite; parallel-safe. The systemic F-053 surface (31 files) is mechanical; the streamed-reply announcement (F-050) is the one judgment site (announcement granularity/timing).
